manifesto.body:
Toprak & Co. walks with you from idea to launch. We respect nature and human stories in every project, crafting outcomes that feel as good as they perform.

As a small, focused studio, we bring design, voice, translation and digital product craft to the same table.

grafik-tasarim.title: Graphic Design
grafik-tasarim.description: Social posts, banners, book covers, magazine layouts and corporate identity work. We produce tailored, eye-catching visual content for every platform.

ceviri.title: Translation
ceviri.description: Professional translation between Turkish, English, French and German. With three published book translations and dozens of academic articles, we deliver precise, fluent copy.

seslendirme.title: Voice Over
seslendirme.description: Professional voice over for documentary, advertising, e-learning, audiobooks and corporate projects. Studio-grade recording and direction for polished audio production.

icerik-uretimi.title: Content & Social Media
icerik-uretimi.description: We find your brand voice. Strategy, planning, creative production and publishing — proven social media management across tourism, book retail and beauty.

fotograf-video.title: Photo & Video
fotograf-video.description: From product photography to corporate video, short film to social content. Professional shooting, editing and colour grading.

web-yazilim.title: Web & Software
web-yazilim.description: Fast, elegant, scalable sites with Next.js, Supabase and modern stacks. End-to-end build and maintenance with five live references.

services.subtitle: We deliver end-to-end creative services that balance aesthetics, strategy, and function for modern brands.

meta.title: Privacy Policy & KVKK | Toprak & Co.
meta.description: Toprak & Co. privacy policy and KVKK disclosure: how we process personal data, retention, and your rights.

controller.heading: 1. Data controller
controller.body:
Toprak & Co. — Ece [Surname] & Eymen [Surname]
info@toprakco.tr / toprakco.tr

collected.heading: 2. What data we collect
items: Contact form: name, email, phone, message

purpose.heading: 3. Why we collect data
items: To respond to requests and questions

sharing.heading: 4. Who we share data with
sharing.body:
We do not share your data with third parties for marketing.
Aside from Supabase (database) and Vercel (hosting), we do not use other services that receive your personal data.

retention.heading: 5. Retention period
retention.body: Contact data is kept for 2 years, then deleted.

rights.heading: 6. Your rights (KVKK Art. 11)
rights.body:
You have the right to access, rectify, and request deletion of your data.
Requests: info@toprakco.tr

cookies.heading: 7. Cookie policy
cookies.body:
Only essential technical cookies are used.
Analytics is not active at this time.

meta.title: FAQ | Toprak & Co.
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about Toprak & Co. services, timelines, and delivery.

sss.redirecting: Taking you to the contact page…
sss.intro: Quick answers to common questions. If you need something specific, reach out via the contact form.

items.a: We cover graphic design, translation, voice over, content, photo & video, and web development — often combined when a project needs more than one craft.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: It depends on scope. A small social pack may take days; a multilingual site or a book-related project can take weeks. We share a clear timeline in the proposal.
We quote per project based on scope, languages, revision rounds, and deliverables — transparent and agreed before production starts.
Yes. Revision allowances are defined per service in the agreement. Extra rounds can be added if needed.
Yes. We collaborate with clients locally and internationally with async workflows and scheduled calls when useful.

items.q: Which file formats do you accept for translation or VO?
items.a: Common formats include Word/PDF, InDesign packages, subtitles (SRT/VTT), and broadcast-ready audio (WAV/AIFF). We confirm deliverables at kickoff.
Yes — updates, small improvements, content entry, and performance checks are available as monthly retainers or task bundles.

items.q: Who owns the rights to the deliverables?
items.a: After payment, usage rights transfer as defined in the contract. Stock assets and third-party licenses are listed separately.
Sometimes, if the schedule allows. Rush work may include an express fee — share your deadline and deliverables clearly.

items.q: What should I send to get started?
items.a: A short brief or email describing goals, audience, languages, and deadlines is enough. We follow up with a few clarifying questions and next steps.

contact.subtitle: Let's have a coffee about your project.

form.privacyConsentBefore: I have read and accept the

items.q: How does your project process work?
items.a: We start with a free discovery call, then a proposal, then production, then delivery — including revision rounds.
Every project is unique. We quote based on scope and timeline.
Yes — we work with clients across Turkey and internationally.
Yes — at least two revision rounds are included on every project.

items.q: How fast can you deliver translations?
items.a: Roughly 1,000 words per day on average. Rush options are available for urgent work.

items.q: Do I need a studio for voice recording?
items.a: No — we record broadcast-quality audio from a treated home studio.

items.q: For social media management, do you create the content?
items.a: Yes — we produce photo, video, graphics, and copy in-house.

where.title: Where are we?
where.line2: But in every sense, we’re remote —
where.line3: we can work with you from anywhere in the world.
